citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The facility does not have a Program of Veterinary Care for their cats. The facility seeks veterinary care at a local
veterinary clinic but does not have an attending veterinarian under a formal agreement.
A written Program of Veterinary Care must identify a veterinarian who has formally agreed to serve as the attending
veterinarian for the facility. This agreement includes conducting at least one on site visit annually and preparing or
reviewing the Program of Veterinary Care. Failure to secure an attending veterinarian prevents APHIS officials from
determining whether animals at the facility are receiving adequate veterinary care or whether appropriate methods are
being used to prevent, diagnose, control, and treat diseases and injuries.
Each dealer and exhibitor shall employ an attending veterinarian under formal arrangements. In the case of a part-time
attending veterinarian or consultant arrangements, the formal arrangements shall include a written program of veterinary
care and regularly scheduled visits to the premises of the dealer or exhibitor.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.40(a)(1) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The facility does not have a Program of Veterinary Care for their cats. The facility seeks veterinary care at a local 
veterinary clinic but does not have an attending veterinarian under a formal agreement. 
 
A written Program of Veterinary Care must identify a veterinarian who has formally agreed to serve as the attending 
veterinarian for the facility. This agreement includes conducting at least one on site visit annually and preparing or 
reviewing the Program of Veterinary Care. Failure to secure an attending veterinarian prevents APHIS officials from 
determining whether animals at the facility are receiving adequate veterinary care or whether appropriate methods are 
being used to prevent, diagnose, control, and treat diseases and injuries. 
 
Each dealer and exhibitor shall employ an attending veterinarian under formal arrangements. In the case of a part-time 
attending veterinarian or consultant arrangements, the formal arrangements shall include a written program of veterinary 
care and regularly scheduled visits to the premises of the dealer or exhibitor. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
